ocr_findings.description: 電子メールの宛先記入欄 table: OCR renders right column as empty (matches image which shows blank input fields). Table structure preserved with 3 rows (宛先/CC/BCC). Checkbox symbol ☑ in OCR not present in image labels but harmless.
Lesson 14-05 intro illustration (woman with tea ceremony) captured as image placeholder; no text lost

reviewer_notes: Page 480 of the source. Lesson 14-05 インターネットサービス chapter intro with 電子メール section and blank宛先 table. All body paragraphs accurately reproduced. Table right-column blank is faithful to the image (template fields).
